data.en: What's your favourite subject?
data.cn: 你最喜欢的科目是什么？
accept: Your favourite subject is what?

data.en: My favourite subject is art.
data.cn: 我最喜欢的科目是美术。
accept: Art is my favourite subject.

data.en: Why do you like art?
data.cn: 你为什么喜欢美术？

data.en: Because it's fun.
data.cn: 因为它很有趣。

data.en: Ella doesn't like history because it's hard.
data.cn: 埃拉不喜欢历史，因为它很难。
data.hint: 使用 because 连接原因
accept: Because it's hard, Ella doesn't like history.

data.en: Ella's favourite subject is art because it's fun.
data.cn: 埃拉最喜欢的科目是美术，因为它很有趣。
data.hint: 主系表结构 + 原因状语从句
accept: Because it's fun, Ella's favourite subject is art.

data.en: Peter doesn't like maths because it's boring.
data.cn: 彼得不喜欢数学，因为它很乏味。
accept: Because it's boring, Peter doesn't like maths.

data.en: Peter's favourite subject is PE because it's exciting.
data.cn: 彼得最喜欢的科目是体育，因为它很令人兴奋。
accept: Because it's exciting, Peter's favourite subject is PE.

data.en: I have art and geography today.
data.cn: 我今天有美术课和地理课。
accept: Today I have art and geography.

data.en: I like those subjects too.
data.cn: 我也喜欢那些科目。

data.en: What's your next class?
data.cn: 你的下一节是什么课？

data.en: History is my favourite subject.
data.cn: 历史是我最喜欢的科目。
data.hint: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
accept: My favourite subject is history.

data.en: It's interesting to learn about the past.
data.cn: 了解过去很有趣。
data.hint: It is adj. to do sth. 结构

data.en: My English teacher is really nice.
data.cn: 我的英语老师人非常好。

data.en: I like all the subjects, but my favourite is maths.
data.cn: 我喜欢所有的科目，但我最喜欢的是数学。
accept: All the subjects I like, but my favourite is maths.

data.en: Because I'm good with numbers.
data.cn: 因为我很擅长处理数字。

data.en: Oh, it's difficult for me.
data.cn: 哦，对我来说这很难。

data.en: Can you help me with this subject?
data.cn: 你能帮我学习这门功课吗？
data.hint: help sb. with sth. 结构

data.en: Let's go to class!
data.cn: 我们去上课吧！

data.en: I study maths, music, and IT.
data.cn: 我学习数学、音乐和信息技术。
accept: I study music, maths, and IT.

data.en: English is important, and my English teacher is really nice.
data.cn: 英语很重要，而且我的英语老师人非常好。
accept: My English teacher is really nice, and English is important.

data.en: Biology is difficult but important.
data.cn: 生物很难但很重要。
accept: Biology is important but difficult.

data.en: History is my favourite subject, but my sister doesn't like it.
data.cn: 历史是我最喜欢的科目，但我姐姐不喜欢它。
accept: My sister doesn't like it, but history is my favourite subject.

data.en: He doesn't like maths because it's boring to him.
data.cn: 他不喜欢数学，因为数学对他来说很乏味。
data.hint: because 引导原因状语从句
accept: Because it's boring to him, he doesn't like maths.

data.en: We use because to give a reason.
data.cn: 我们使用 because 来给出理由。

data.en: I like to learn about IT because it's fun to use computers.
data.cn: 我喜欢学习信息技术，因为使用电脑很有趣。
accept: Because it's fun to use computers, I like to learn about IT.

data.en: My favourite subject is geography because I like travelling.
data.cn: 我最喜欢的科目是地理，因为我喜欢旅行。
accept: Because I like travelling, my favourite subject is geography.

data.en: I love Thursday afternoons because we have a fun class then.
data.cn: 我喜欢周四下午，因为那时我们有一堂有趣的课。
accept: Because we have a fun class then, I love Thursday afternoons.

data.en: Miss Baker works hard to make the class interesting.
data.cn: 贝克小姐努力工作，让课堂变得有趣。

data.en: Sometimes it's difficult to remember all the information.
data.cn: 有时很难记住所有的信息。
data.hint: It is adj. to do sth.

data.en: I'm a student in Canada.
data.cn: 我是一名加拿大的学生。

data.en: Music always makes me happy.
data.cn: 音乐总是让我快乐。

data.en: He lets us play all kinds of interesting instruments.
data.cn: 他让我们演奏各种有趣的乐器。
accept: All kinds of interesting instruments he lets us play.

data.en: I want to be a singer in the future.
data.cn: 我将来想成为一名歌手。
accept: In the future I want to be a singer.

data.en: I like maths because I'm good with numbers.
data.cn: 我喜欢数学，因为我擅长处理数字。
accept: Because I'm good with numbers, I like maths.

data.en: It feels like magic and is really fun.
data.cn: 它感觉像魔法，真的很有趣。
accept: It is really fun and feels like magic.

data.en: Maths is very useful in our life.
data.cn: 数学在我们的生活中非常有用。
data.hint: in our life 在我们的生活中

data.en: I want to be a scientist in the future.
data.cn: 我将来想成为一名科学家。
accept: In the future I want to be a scientist.

data.en: What's your favourite class and why?
data.cn: 你最喜欢的课程是什么？为什么？
accept: Why and what's your favourite class?

data.en: We learn how to work out maths problems.
data.cn: 我们学习如何解决数学问题。
data.hint: how to do sth. 如何做某事

data.en: Learn to sing and dance to fun songs.
data.cn: 学习跟着有趣的歌曲唱歌跳舞。

data.en: Work as a team to put on a big show.
data.cn: 作为一个团队合作，举办一场大秀。
accept: To put on a big show, work as a team.

data.en: It's a great way to make new friends too.
data.cn: 这也是结交新朋友的好方法。
accept: Too, it's a great way to make new friends.

data.en: Are you good with your hands?
data.cn: 你手巧吗？
data.hint: be good with one's hands 手巧

data.en: Learn how to make short but interesting videos.
data.cn: 学习如何制作简短但有趣的视频。

data.en: Yoga helps you sleep better and build a good body.
data.cn: 瑜伽帮助你睡眠更好，强身健体。
accept: Yoga helps you build a good body and sleep better.

data.en: Which class would you like to take and why?
data.cn: 你想参加哪门课？为什么？
accept: Why and which class would you like to take?

data.en: Interest is the best teacher.
data.cn: 兴趣是最好的老师。

data.en: I like all the subjects.
data.cn: 我喜欢所有的科目。

data.en: Why do we learn different subjects?
data.cn: 我们为什么要学习不同的科目？
